evidence.raw_block:
interface Ethernet1
   description user-access
   switchport mode access
   switchport access vlan 10
!

interface Ethernet24
   description uplink-core
   switchport mode trunk
   switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,99
!

interface Vlan99
   description management
   ip address 10.0.99.2/24
!

interface 1/1/1
    description user-access
    no shutdown
    vlan access 10
!

interface 1/1/24
    description uplink-core
    no shutdown
    vlan trunk native 1
    vlan trunk allowed 10,20,99
!

interface vlan 99
    description management
    ip address 10.0.99.2/24
!

tagged 24
   tagged 24
   tagged 24
interface 24
   name "uplink-core"
   exit

vlan 99
   name "MGMT"
   tagged 24
   ip address 10.0.99.2 255.255.255.0
   exit

interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/2
 description user-access
 ipv4 address 10.0.10.254 255.255.255.0
!

interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/1.10
 description users
 ipv4 address 10.0.10.1 255.255.255.0
 encapsulation dot1q 10
!

interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/1.20
 description voice
 ipv4 address 10.0.20.1 255.255.255.0
 encapsulation dot1q 20
!

interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/1.99
 description management
 ipv4 address 10.0.99.2 255.255.255.0
 encapsulation dot1q 99
!

interface Ethernet1/1
  description user-access
  switchport
  switchport mode access
  switchport access vlan 10
  no shutdown
!

interface Ethernet1/24
  description uplink-core
  switchport
  switchport mode trunk
  switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,99
  no shutdown
!

interface Vlan99
  description management
  ip address 10.0.99.2/24
  no shutdown
!

configure vlan USERS add ports 1 untagged
configure ports 1 description-string "user-access"

configure vlan USERS add ports 24 tagged
configure vlan VOICE add ports 24 tagged
configure vlan MGMT add ports 24 tagged
configure ports 24 description-string "uplink-core"
configure syslog add 10.0.0.50 vr VR-Default local0

set alias "uplink-core"
        set ip 10.0.99.2 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh

set vdom "root"
        set ip 10.0.10.1 255.255.255.0
        set type vlan
        set vlanid 10
        set interface "port2"

set vdom "root"
        set ip 10.0.20.1 255.255.255.0
        set type vlan
        set vlanid 20
        set interface "port2"

set dst 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0
        set gateway 10.0.99.1
        set device "port1"

set dst 192.168.50.0 255.255.255.0
        set gateway 10.0.99.254
        set device "port1"

set name "users-to-lab"
        set srcintf "vlan10-users"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set service "HTTPS"

set name "ssh-deny"
        set srcintf "vlan10-users"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set service "SSH"

interface eth-0-1
 description user-access
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
 no shutdown
!

interface eth-0-24
 description uplink-core
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed only 10,20,99
 no shutdown
!

interface vlan 99
 description management-svi
 ip address 10.0.99.2/24
 no shutdown
!

interface GigabitEthernet1/0/1
 description user-access
 port link-mode bridge
 port link-type access
 port access vlan 10

interface GigabitEthernet1/0/24
 description uplink-core
 port link-mode bridge
 port link-type trunk
 port trunk permit vlan 10 20 99

interface Vlan-interface99
 description management
 ip address 10.0.99.2 255.255.255.0

tagged 24
   tagged 24
   tagged 24
interface 24
   name "uplink-core"
   exit

vlan 99
   name "MGMT"
   tagged 24
   ip address 10.0.99.2 255.255.255.0
   exit

interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description user-access
 port link-type access
 port default vlan 10

interface GigabitEthernet0/0/24
 description uplink-core
 port link-type trunk
 port trunk allow-pass vlan 10 20 99

interface Vlanif99
 description management
 ip address 10.0.99.2 255.255.255.0

set interfaces ge-0/0/1 description user-access
set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode access
set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members USERS

set interfaces ge-0/0/24 description uplink-core
set interfaces ge-0/0/24 unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode trunk
set interfaces ge-0/0/24 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members [ USERS VOICE MGMT ]
set interfaces irb unit 99 family inet address 10.0.99.2/24
set system syslog host 10.0.0.50 any info

/interface vlan add name=vlan99-mgmt interface=bridge-users vlan-id=99
/ip address add address=10.0.99.2/24 interface=vlan99-mgmt comment=management
/interface bridge port add bridge=bridge-users interface=ether1 pvid=10 comment=user-access

/interface bridge port add bridge=bridge-users interface=ether24 comment=uplink-core
/interface bridge vlan add bridge=bridge-users tagged=ether24 vlan-ids=10,20,99
/system logging action add name=remote target=remote remote=10.0.0.50

configure port 1/1/1 description "user-access"
configure port 1/1/1 ethernet mode access
configure port 1/1/1 ethernet encap-type dot1q

configure port 1/1/24 description "uplink-core"
configure port 1/1/24 ethernet mode network
configure port 1/1/24 ethernet encap-type dot1q

configure router interface "mgmt" address 10.0.99.2/24
configure router interface "mgmt" port 1/1/1:99
configure service vpls 10 customer 1 create description "USERS"
configure service vpls 20 customer 1 create description "VOICE"
configure service vpls 99 customer 1 create description "MGMT"
configure router static-route-entry 0.0.0.0/0 next-hop 10.0.99.1 no shutdown
configure router static-route-entry 192.168.50.0/24 next-hop 10.0.99.254 no shutdown
configure system snmp community "public" r version both
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 layer3 units ethernet1/1.10 tag 10 ip 10.0.10.1/24
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 layer3 units ethernet1/1.20 tag 20 ip 10.0.20.1/24
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 layer3 units ethernet1/1.99 tag 99 ip 10.0.99.2/24
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 comment uplink-core

set network interface ethernet ethernet1/2 layer3 ip 10.0.10.254/24
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/2 comment user-access
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 layer3 units ethernet1/1.10 tag 10 ip 10.0.10.1/24
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 layer3 units ethernet1/1.20 tag 20 ip 10.0.20.1/24
set network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 layer3 units ethernet1/1.99 tag 99 ip 10.0.99.2/24

set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route DEFAULT destination 0.0.0.0/0
set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route DEFAULT nexthop ip-address 10.0.99.1

set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route LAB destination 192.168.50.0/24
set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route LAB nexthop ip-address 10.0.99.254
set zone trust network layer3 [ ethernet1/1.10 ethernet1/1.20 ethernet1/2 ]
set zone mgmt network layer3 ethernet1/1.99

set rulebase security rules users-to-lab from trust
set rulebase security rules users-to-lab to mgmt
set rulebase security rules users-to-lab service tcp-443
set rulebase security rules users-to-lab action allow

set rulebase security rules ssh-deny from trust
set rulebase security rules ssh-deny to mgmt
set rulebase security rules ssh-deny service tcp-22
set rulebase security rules ssh-deny action deny
set deviceconfig system ntp-servers primary-ntp-server ntp-server-address 10.0.0.123
set shared log-settings syslog SYSLOG-PROFILE server LOGHOST transport UDP port 514 server 10.0.0.50
set deviceconfig system snmp-setting access-setting version v2c snmp-community-string public

set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif 10 description 'USERS'
set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif 10 address '10.0.10.1/24'

set interfaces ethernet eth0 vif 20 description 'VOICE'
set interfaces ethernet eth0 vif 20 address '10.0.20.1/24'

set interfaces ethernet eth0 vif 99 description 'MGMT'
set interfaces ethernet eth0 vif 99 address '10.0.99.2/24'
set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif 10 description 'USERS'
set interfaces ethernet eth0 vif 20 description 'VOICE'
set interfaces ethernet eth0 vif 99 description 'MGMT'
set system syslog host '10.0.0.50' facility all level 'info'
set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif 10 description 'USERS'

set interfaces ethernet eth24 vif 99
set interfaces ethernet eth24 vif 99 address '10.0.99.2/24'
set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif 10 description 'USERS'
set system syslog host '10.0.0.50' facility all level 'info'
